an1.71:0.2: 8. The Good Friends and So Forth Chapter
an1.71:1.1: "I do not see, *bhikkhus*, any other single *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does, *bhikkhus*, good friendship.
an1.71:1.2: For one with a good friend, *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline."
an1.72:1.1: "I do not see, *bhikkhus*, any other single *dhamma* by which unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline, as does, *bhikkhus*, devotion to unwholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to wholesome *dhammas*.
an1.72:1.2: Through devotion to unwholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to wholesome *dhammas*, *bhikkhus*, unarisen unwholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen wholesome *dhammas* decline."
an1.73:1.1: "I do not see, *bhikkhus*, any other single *dhamma* by which unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline, as does, *bhikkhus*, devotion to wholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to unwholesome *dhammas*.
an1.73:1.2: Through devotion to wholesome *dhammas* and non-devotion to unwholesome *dhammas*, *bhikkhus*, unarisen wholesome *dhammas* arise and arisen unwholesome *dhammas* decline."
an1.74:1.1: "I do not see, *bhikkhus*, any other single *dhamma* by which unarisen *bojjhaṅgas* do not arise and arisen *bojjhaṅgas* do not reach full development [*bhāvanā*], as does, *bhikkhus*, inappropriate attention [*ayonisomanasikāro*].
an1.74:1.2: For one attending inappropriately [*ayoniso manasi karoto*], *bhikkhus*, unarisen *bojjhaṅgas* do not arise and arisen *bojjhaṅgas* do not reach full development [*bhāvanā*]."
an1.75:1.1: "I do not see, *bhikkhus*, any other single *dhamma* by which unarisen *bojjhaṅgas* arise and arisen *bojjhaṅgas* reach full development [*bhāvanā*], as does, *bhikkhus*, appropriate attention [*yonisomanasikāro*].
an1.75:1.2: For one attending appropriately [*yoniso manasi karoto*], *bhikkhus*, unarisen *bojjhaṅgas* arise and arisen *bojjhaṅgas* reach full development [*bhāvanā*]."
an1.76:1.1: "This is a trifling decline, *bhikkhus* — the decline of relatives.
an1.76:1.2: This is the worst of declines, *bhikkhus* — the decline of discernment [*paññā*]."
an1.77:1.1: "This is a trifling growth, *bhikkhus* — the growth of relatives.
an1.77:1.2: This is the foremost of growths, *bhikkhus* — the growth of discernment [*paññā*].
an1.77:1.3: Therefore, *bhikkhus*, you should train yourselves thus:
an1.77:1.5: For that is how you should train yourselves, *bhikkhus*."
an1.78:1.1: "This is a trifling decline, *bhikkhus* — the decline of wealth.
an1.78:1.2: This is the worst of declines, *bhikkhus* — the decline of discernment [*paññā*]."
an1.79:1.1: "This is a trifling growth, *bhikkhus* — the growth of wealth.
an1.79:1.2: This is the foremost of growths, *bhikkhus* — the growth of discernment [*paññā*].
an1.79:1.3: Therefore, *bhikkhus*, you should train yourselves thus:
an1.79:1.5: For that is how you should train yourselves, *bhikkhus*."
an1.80:1.1: "This is a trifling decline, *bhikkhus* — the decline of reputation.
an1.80:1.2: This is the worst of declines, *bhikkhus* — the decline of discernment [*paññā*]."
an1.81:1.1: "This is a trifling growth, *bhikkhus* — the growth of reputation.
an1.81:1.2: This is the foremost of growths, *bhikkhus* — the growth of discernment [*paññā*].
an1.81:1.3: Therefore, *bhikkhus*, you should train yourselves thus:
an1.81:1.5: For that is how you should train yourselves, *bhikkhus*."
an1.81:1.7: The eighth chapter: Good Friends and So Forth.
